content:
# Suno vs Udio vs AIVA: Best AI Music Generator 2026

AI music generation has evolved incredibly fast. Let's compare the three most popular options to find the best fit for your needs!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Suno: The Versatile Creator

Suno can generate music with vocals in any style.

### Suno Strengths
- **With vocals**: Full songs with lyrics
- **Any genre**: From pop to classical
- **Fast generation**: Quick turnaround
- **Customizable**: Control style and mood

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## Udio: The New Contender

Udio is gaining traction for its intuitive interface and quality.

### Udio Strengths
- **Great interface**: Easy to use
- **High quality**: Professional-sounding music
- **Remixing**: Build on existing tracks
- **Community**: Share and discover

---

## AIVA: The Professional Composer

AIVA focuses on orchestral and professional music.

### AIVA Strengths
- **Classical focus**: Orchestral compositions
- **Professional quality**: Studio-grade output
- **Royalty-free**: Commercial use allowed
- **MIDI export**: Edit in your DAW

---

## Comparison Table

| Feature | Suno | Udio | AIVA |
|---------|-----------|------|------|
| Price | $8/mo | $10/mo | $15/mo |
| Best For | Versatile creators | Modern music | Professional/orchestral |
| Vocals | Yes | Yes | No |
| Genre Variety | Excellent | Great | Classical focus |
| Royalty-free | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| MIDI Export | Limited | Limited | Yes |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Most versatile**: Choose Suno
- **Modern music**: Try Udio
- **Professional/orchestral**: Go with AIVA

Want more comparisons? Check out ElevenLabs vs Murf vs Play.ht
